metadata.title: Davide Avagnano — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Davide Avagnano, freelance software engineer. I build accessible, scalable, high-performance web applications with React and the Next.js ecosystem.

hero.role: I build and maintain end-to-end production systems with TypeScript, React, Next.js and Node.js on PostgreSQL.
hero.intro: I've contributed to high-volume platforms and built a complete SaaS on my own. My center of gravity is the backend: data modeling, type-safe APIs, async workers, security and deployment.
hero.location: Naples, Italy — working remotely, open to relocation.

profile.lead: I come from aerospace engineering. Today I design and build systems that ship to production, from the database to the deploy.
profile.p1: I graduated in Aerospace Engineering at Federico II in 2020. I started a master's and dropped it after two exams: I had realised what I actually wanted to do was write software. From 2023 I taught myself, starting with frontend work in React, Next.js and TypeScript and growing into full-stack.
profile.p2: Since February 2025 I've been working full-time as a freelance fullstack developer for several clients. I've contributed to high-volume production platforms — marketing intelligence, e-commerce analytics, cross-platform data reconciliation — and, in parallel, single-handedly designed and built a booking SaaS, from architecture to deployment.
profile.p3: My center of gravity is the backend: data modeling, end-to-end type-safe APIs, idempotent async workers, fine-grained authorization, encryption of personal data, deployment and observability. I use AI where it brings real value, with an eye on cost — not as a party trick.
profile.p4: What engineering left me is the method: model the problem before writing the code, and treat documentation as part of the finished work.

degree.title: BSc in Aerospace Engineering
degree.description: Federico II University, Naples — 105/110. Started a master's and dropped it after two exams, to move towards software.

selfTaught.title: Self-taught career switch
selfTaught.description: From studying to the first real projects: frontend with React, Next.js and TypeScript, then the jump to full-stack. A technical foundation built from scratch, outside academia.

freelance.title: First freelance engagement
freelance.description: I start working as a fullstack developer on a consultancy basis. I contribute to performance marketing and data analytics ecosystems, and to security operations tooling.

now.title: Fullstack Developer, consulting
now.description: Working full-time for several clients, in teams of 3 to 5 people, alongside CTOs, designers and marketing. In parallel, I design and build a booking SaaS on my own, from architecture to deployment.

skills.patternsList: End-to-end type-safe architectures from database to client, multi-source ETL, event-driven systems and async jobs, fine-grained RBAC, encryption of personal data, multi-tenancy, multi-layer caching, internationalization.

sections.projects: Real case studies grouped by type: SaaS, data & performance marketing, infra & security.

contact.title: Let's work together.
contact.intro: Got a product to ship, a system to put back in order or a team to strengthen? Drop me a couple of lines about what you need.

form.name: Name

footer.tagline: Freelance fullstack developer. End-to-end production systems.
